subject: Payment Plan Confirmation - Full-Stack Web Development Bootcamp
html:
Payment Plan Confirmation

Dear john,

Your payment plan for Full-Stack Web Development Bootcamp has been set up successfully.

Payment Plan Details:

Total Amount: $5000.00

Number of Installments: 3

Installment Amount: $1667.00 per month

Next Payment Due: July 31, 2025

You will receive payment reminders before each due date. To make your next payment, please log in to your dashboard.

Thank you for choosing LearnFlow for your educational journey!

Best regards,
The LearnFlow Team
